mapper.insert: INSERT INTO character_card ( id, user_id, card_name, user_name, character_name, card_description, card_content, initial_prompt, first_mes, avatar, mes_example, scenario, nsfw, delete_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{cardName}, #{userName}, #{characterName}, #{cardDescription}, #{cardContent}, #{initialPrompt}, #{firstMes}, #{avatar}, #{mesExample}, #{scenario}, #{nsfw}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, card_name, user_name, character_name, card_description, card_content, initial_prompt, first_mes, avatar, mes_example, scenario, nsfw, delete_status, create_time, update_time FROM character_card WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_status = 1

SELECT id, user_id, card_name, user_name, character_name, card_description, initial_prompt, avatar, scenario, nsfw, delete_status, create_time, update_time FROM character_card WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_status = 1 AND nsfw = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, card_name, user_name, character_name, card_description, initial_prompt, avatar, scenario, nsfw, delete_status, create_time, update_time FROM character_card WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_status = 1
AND nsfw = 0
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE character_card SET card_name = #{cardName}, user_name = #{userName}, character_name = #{characterName}, initial_prompt = #{initialPrompt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_status = 1
UPDATE character_card SET delete_status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
